Metadata.title: Thomas Barthelemy — Freelance Web Developer based in Alès, France
Metadata.description: Freelance web developer based in Alès, southern France (Gard). Fast, Google-friendly websites for small businesses. Free quote.
Metadata.ogAlt: Thomas Barthelemy — Freelance Web Developer based in Alès, France

JsonLd.offerVitrineDescription: Professional marketing website built from scratch, delivered in 2 to 3 weeks. Modern design, local SEO optimisation for Google, secure contact form. Starting at €1,500.
JsonLd.offerRefonteDescription: Full redesign of your existing website. New design, content migration, performance and Google SEO improvements. Starting at €3,000.
JsonLd.offerEcommerceDescription: Online shop, customer area, online booking, custom business tool. Delivered in 4 to 8 weeks. Starting at €5,000.

Hero.subtitle: Freelance web developer based in Alès, France — websites for independents and small businesses
Hero.intro: I build fast, Google-friendly websites designed to turn visitors into customers. Delivered in 2 to 4 weeks, no tech jargon.

Services.intro: Every project is different. Here are the three formats I offer most often — then we adapt to your actual needs.

items.title: Showcase website
items.description: To present your business, capture quote requests and build credibility with your prospects.
items.for: Best for: craftspeople, independents, small businesses

items.title: Full redesign
items.description: Your current site looks dated, is too slow, or doesn't convert? Let's start from a solid foundation.
features: Free audit of your existing site
items.for: Best for: SMBs with an outdated or under-performing site

items.title: E-commerce & business tools
items.description: Online shop, customer portal, online booking, internal tool… We build what your business is missing.
items.for: Best for: retailers, practitioners, growing SMBs

includesList: First year of hosting included — no hidden fees
Google SEO configured from day one
Manage your own content — training included
1 month of free support after delivery

Projects.empty: I'm currently working on real case studies that will be published here very soon.

Method.intro: No jargon, no surprises, no commitment before the quote. Here's how it goes from first contact to launch.

steps.title: We talk
steps.description: We get to know each other. You tell me about your business, your goals, your constraints. I tell you what's realistic and what isn't.

steps.title: I design
steps.description: I send you a clear proposal: sitemap, mockup, timeline, fixed quote. You approve, we start. Otherwise, you owe me nothing.

steps.title: I build
steps.description: You follow progress live via a private link. We fine-tune along the way. No surprises at delivery.

steps.title: We launch
steps.description: I put the site live, train you to manage the content, and support you for one month free for any last adjustments.

Pricing.paragraph1: A showcase website for a three-person practice has nothing in common with an online store for a launching brand.
Pricing.paragraph2: That's why I always start with a free 30-minute discovery call — I learn your business, your goals, your constraints. Then, and only then, you get a clear fixed quote, no surprises.
Pricing.promise: No hidden billing. No bad surprises. No commitment before the signed quote.

About.titleB: — freelance web developer based in Alès, France.
About.bio: Joiner by trade, web developer by passion. Based in Alès, southern France, I build websites for independents and small businesses — locally in the Gard region and remotely across France. What sets me apart: I come from their world. 17 years in the building trade — 12 as a joiner, 5 in the design office — and 7 years of self-taught coding alongside it. I know what a real jobsite looks like, what a quote that actually holds up reads like, and what it's like to work for someone who doesn't have time to decode tech-speak.
About.paragraph2: No outsourcing. One dedicated contact from first call to launch, a reply within 24 h on weekdays, and a quote you can actually read — in plain language, not in JavaScript.
About.focus: Showcase websites for craftspeople, practitioners and small businesses — primarily around Alès, Nîmes, Uzès and across the Gard department, and remotely anywhere in France. Redesigns, online booking tools, small online stores.

points: Self-taught developer since 2019 — started with C++, focused on web for the past 3 years (React, Next.js, Node, PostgreSQL).
Run alongside a salaried job, with the goal of going full-time. First sites already delivered.
12 years in the workshop and on site — fit-out, bespoke joinery, installation (2009 → 2021).
Since 2021, design office technician: design, costing, site preparation, and daily contact with clients, architects and suppliers.

items.q: How much does a website cost?
items.a: As a rough guide, a well-built showcase website typically starts around €1,500, a full redesign around €3,000, and an e-commerce project around €5,000. But it's deliberately indicative — the real price depends on your needs. We discuss it during the discovery call, and I send you a fixed quote right after.

items.q: How long does it take to build a website?
items.a: Plan for 2 to 3 weeks for a showcase site, 3 to 5 weeks for a redesign, 4 to 8 weeks for an e-commerce or tailor-made project. I commit to a firm delivery date in the quote.

Yes. I'm based in Alès, in southern France, but I work remotely with clients across France. A video call is usually all we need. I also travel locally within about 50 km — Nîmes, Uzès, Bagnols-sur-Cèze, Anduze and the wider Gard area.

Yes, when it's the right fit. For projects where you need simple, autonomous content management, WordPress (or a headless CMS) can be the right call. For high-performance sites, I prefer Next.js. We choose together based on your actual usage.

items.q: Can I edit my site myself?
items.a: Yes. You'll have a simple interface to edit texts, images, prices, hours, projects — no tech skills needed. A 30-minute training is included at delivery.

You get one month of free support for small adjustments. After that, I stay available for any evolutions (new content, new features, extra pages) on a per-quote basis or via a monthly maintenance package.

items.q: Why you and not an agency?
items.a: Because you'll have a single point of contact, who replies fast, doesn't outsource anything, and won't charge you three layers of margin. An agency is still a good fit for very large projects; for everything else, you gain clarity and responsiveness.

Contact.description: Tell me about your business, what you want to improve, your timeline. I reply within 24 hours on weekdays — no commitment required.
Contact.name: Name
Contact.messagePlaceholder: E.g. I'm a plumber near Lyon. I need a website to show up on Google and get quote requests. Ideally live before summer.
Contact.protected: Protected by honeypot + rate-limit. No spam, ever.
Contact.success: Thanks — your message is in. I'll reply within 24 h on weekdays.
Contact.errorFallback: Something went wrong. Try again later.

Footer.crafted: Built in Alès, France, with care.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.body: All content on this website (text, images, logos, source code, graphic design) is the exclusive property of Thomas Barthelemy, unless otherwise stated. Any reproduction, distribution, modification or use, even partial, is forbidden without prior written authorisation.

liability.title: Liability
liability.body: Information on this website is provided for guidance. While I take every care to ensure accuracy, I cannot be held liable for errors, omissions, or any damage resulting from the use of this information. External links are provided for convenience; I have no control over their content.

law.title: Governing law
law.body: These legal notices are governed by French law. Any dispute shall fall within the sole jurisdiction of French courts.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For any enquiry, please contact me at {email} or via the contact form on this site.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.body: This policy explains how your personal data is collected, used and protected when you browse this site or contact me. It complies with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the French Data Protection Act.

controller.title: Data controller
controller.body:
The data controller is:

**Thomas Barthelemy**
1386 Route d'Auzas
30140 Saint Jean du Pin
France
Email: {email}

data.title: Data collected
data.body:
When you use the contact form, I only collect:

- Your **name**
- Your **email address**
- The **content of the message** you send

No other data is collected without your knowledge. This site uses **no advertising tracking tool** (no Google Analytics, no Facebook pixel, no ad cookies banner).

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.body:
Your data is used exclusively to:

- Reply to your enquiry
- Issue a quote where relevant
- Keep a history of our exchanges to follow up on the project

Your data is **never sold, rented or shared** with third parties for commercial purposes.

legalBasis.title: Legal basis
legalBasis.body: Processing is based on your **consent** (voluntary form submission) and on the **legitimate interest** to reply to your business enquiry.

retention.title: Retention
retention.body: Your data is kept for **3 years** from our last exchange, in line with CNIL guidelines for business prospecting. Beyond this period, it is automatically deleted.

recipients.title: Recipients
recipients.body: Your data is only accessible to me (Thomas Barthelemy). It is stored on Supabase servers (see Legal notice) and may transit through Vercel for hosting. No other third party has access.

rights.title: Your GDPR rights
rights.body:
Under the GDPR, you have the following rights over your personal data at any time:

- **Right of access**: obtain a copy of your data
- **Right of rectification**: correct inaccurate data
- **Right to erasure**: ask for your data to be deleted
- **Right to object**: refuse processing
- **Right to portability**: get your data in a readable format
- **Right to restriction**: restrict processing

To exercise any of these rights, email me at {email}. I will reply within a maximum of 30 days.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body:
This website only uses **strictly necessary** cookies:

- A session cookie for accessing the admin area (me only)
- A language preference cookie (FR / EN)

No advertising cookie, no audience-tracking cookie, no third-party cookie is set on your browser.

complaint.title: Complaint
complaint.body:
If you believe your rights are not respected, you may file a complaint with the French data protection authority:

**Commission Nationale de l'Informatique et des Libertés (CNIL)**
3 Place de Fontenoy, TSA 80715
75334 PARIS CEDEX 07
France
https://www.cnil.fr
